description.value:
The void in you drinks the light from the world.

Effect @Template[emanation|distance:20] Nonmagical light sources in the emanation are extinguished and magical light is suppressed for 1 minute. Each enemy in the area takes @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))d6[void]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:your Izir DC|basic]).

You can't use this ability again for [[/r 1d6 #Recharge this ability]]{1d6 rounds}.
